arts.ttl: Player went to bed a step away from signing for Aston Villa – Now set to repack his suitcase
arts.sum: Friday saw Aston Villa swat Sporting CP and others aside and move in to sign Andrés García from Levante. It’s fair A LOT is being said about this transfer in Saturday’s European newspapers, so it’s worth taking them one at a time. Saturday’s edition of Marca reports Garcia is ‘leaving for Unai Emery’s side’. They The post Player went to bed a step away from signing for Aston Villa – Now set to repack his suitcase appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s SURPRISE striker solution: Arteta faces major Premier League interest in €45m man
arts.sum: Arsenal have been tipped to move for Marseille striker Elye Wahi in a bid to solve their current problems in attack. Although Wahi was allowed to move to Marseille unchallenged in the summer for €25 million, La Provence says that Gunners see the France Olympic striker as someone who may be able to step in and help them in the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal line ups vs Aston Villa as Sterling dropped, Trossard starts
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI vs Aston Villa: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Martinelli, Havertz, Trossard. Joe's XI: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Jorginho, Rice, Odegaard; Trossard, Martinelli, Havertz.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host Aston Villa in the Premier League this evening in another crucial clash for the club’s title challenge. Mikel Arteta’s men recovered from a mini-wobble to beat Tottenham Hotspur in the North London derby in midweek. An own goal from Dominic Solanke and Leandro Trossard’s strike sealed the points for Arsenal, who moved with […] The post Arsenal vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Dream Arsenal end to the January transfer window including Sesko and Zubimendi
arts.sum: Sociedad want to keep the player until the summer, but if Arsenal could push through a deal before the January transfer window closes, it will give them a huge lift for the second half of the season. But what does the perfect end to the January transfer window look like for Arsenal ?

arts.ttl: Unai Emery responds to Gary Neville's X-rated Arsenal rant as Austin MacPhee mentioned
arts.sum: Unai Emery has revealed how thoroughly Aston Villa prepare for set-pieces, with a team meeting and at least one session on the grass dedicated to them before a match. I shared my experience with him and we held lots of meetings about how we should prepare the set-pieces for the players.
